**Book your appointment** with the specialist (guaranteed within 1–7 days) - **Arrange for your medical records** to be translated and sent to the hospital in advance - **Issue a medical invitation letter** to help you obtain a medical visa - **Book your accommodation** near the hospital (from budget hotels to luxury serviced apartments) - **Arrange for your airport transfer** and local transportation - **Provide you with a detailed pre-trip guide** with information about what to bring, hospital procedures, and local customs ### Step 4: Arrival & Welcome ### 第四步：抵达与迎接 When you arrive in China: - Our representative will meet you at the airport with a sign with your name on it - We will take you to your accommodation and help you check in - We will provide you with a local SIM card and a welcome package with maps, emergency contact information, and useful tips - We will review your treatment plan with you and answer any last-minute questions ### Step 5: Full-Service Medical Accompaniment ### 第五步：全程医疗陪诊 On the day of your appointment: - Your dedicated medical interpreter and escort will meet you at your accommodation - They will accompany you to the hospital and help you with registration and paperwork - They will translate between you and your doctor during the consultation - They will accompany you to all tests, procedures, and treatment sessions - They will help you with payment, pharmacy, and scheduling follow-up appointments - They will provide you with emotional support and answer any questions you may have ### Step 6: Treatment & Ongoing Support ### 第六步：治疗与持续支持 During your treatment: - Your dedicated coordinator will be in regular contact with you to check on your progress - We will help you with any logistical issues that may arise, such as extending your visa or changing your accommodation - We will provide you with translated copies of all your medical reports and test results - We can help you communicate with your family and doctors back home - We offer 24/7 emergency support in case of any medical emergencies ### Step 7: Discharge & Follow-Up Care ### 第七步：出院与随访护理 When your treatment is complete: - We will help you with the discharge process and ensure that you have all your medications and medical records - We will provide you with a detailed discharge summary translated into your language - We will schedule any necessary follow-up appointments - We can arrange for your medical records to be sent to your doctor back home - We will stay in touch with you for 30 days after your discharge to ensure that your recovery is going smoothly - We can help you book your return flight and arrange for airport transfer --- ## Part 6: Essential Information for Foreign Patients in China ## 第六部分：外籍患者来华就医必备信息 ### 6.1 Required Documents ### 6.1 必备文件 When coming to China for medical treatment, you will need the following documents: - **Valid passport** (must be valid for at least 6 months beyond your intended stay) - **Medical visa (M visa)** or **tourist visa (L visa)** - **Medical invitation letter** (issued by Aether Dragon Medical) - **Previous medical records, test results, and imaging studies** (translated into Chinese if possible) - **List of current medications** (with generic names) - **Medical insurance card and policy documents** (if applicable) - **Proof of sufficient funds** to cover your medical expenses and stay in China ### 6.2 Medical Insurance in China ### 6.2 中国医疗保险 Most international insurance companies provide coverage for medical treatment in China. However, it's important to check with your insurance provider before you travel to ensure that you are covered. Aether Dragon Medical works with over 200 international insurance companies, including: - Aetna - Cigna - BUPA - Allianz - AXA - MetLife - Prudential - UnitedHealthcare We can help you: - Verify your insurance coverage - Facilitate direct billing with your insurance company - Prepare and submit insurance claims - Translate medical documents for insurance purposes If you don't have international insurance, we can help you purchase a short-term medical insurance policy that covers your stay in China. ### 6.3 Emergency Medical Procedures ### 6.3 紧急医疗流程 In case of a medical emergency in China: 1. **Call 120** immediately for an ambulance 2. **Call Aether Dragon Medical's 24/7 emergency line** at +86 139 2191 5089 3. Have your passport and medical insurance information ready 4. Try to stay calm and explain your symptoms clearly 5. We will dispatch an interpreter to the hospital immediately to assist you ### 6.4 Payment Methods ### 6.4 支付方式 Most hospitals in China accept the following payment methods: - Cash (Chinese Yuan) - Credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) - Debit cards - Mobile payment (Alipay, WeChat Pay) Aether Dragon Medical can help you exchange currency or set up a mobile payment account if needed. ### 6.5 Cultural Differences & Etiquette ### 6.5 文化差异与礼仪 When receiving medical treatment in China, it's important to be aware of the following cultural differences: - **Doctors are highly respected** in Chinese culture. It's important to be polite and respectful when speaking to your doctor. - **Family involvement** is common in Chinese medical care. It's not unusual for family members to be present during consultations and to make decisions on behalf of the patient. - **Traditional Chinese medicine** is widely used in China. Many doctors will recommend a combination of Western and traditional Chinese medicine treatments. - **Hospital visiting hours** are usually more flexible in China than in Western countries. However, it's still important to check with the hospital before visiting. ### 6.6 Useful Chinese Phrases ### 6.6 实用中文短语 Here are some useful Chinese phrases that may come in handy during your stay in China: - 你好 (Nǐ hǎo) – Hello - 谢谢 (Xièxie) – Thank you - 对不起 (Duìbuqǐ) – Sorry - 我不会说中文 (Wǒ bù huì shuō zhōngwén) – I don't speak Chinese - 我需要帮助 (Wǒ xūyào bāngzhù) – I need help - 我生病了 (Wǒ shēngbìng le) – I am sick - 我疼 (Wǒ téng) – I am in pain - 救护车 (Jiùhùchē) – Ambulance - 医院 (Yīyuàn) – Hospital - 医生 (Yīshēng) – Doctor - 护士 (Hùshi) – Nurse --- ## Part 7: Aether Dragon Medical 30th Anniversary: Three Decades of Saving Lives ## 第七部分：烛龙国际医疗30周年：三十年拯救生命的历程 2026 marks the 30th anniversary of Aether Dragon Medical. Since our founding in 1996, we have come a long way from a small team of 5 people to a leading international medical concierge service with over 500 employees and offices in 50 Chinese cities. ### 7.1 Our History ### 7.1 我们的历史 - **1996**: Aether Dragon Medical was founded in Shanghai with a mission to help foreigners navigate the Chinese healthcare system. - **2000**: We expanded our services to Beijing and Guangzhou. - **2005**: We established partnerships with 100 top hospitals across China. - **2010**: We launched our 24/7 emergency medical assistance service. - **2015**: We expanded our coverage to 30 Chinese cities and helped our 100,000th patient. - **2020**: We launched our telemedicine service, allowing patients to consult with Chinese doctors remotely. - **2025**: We expanded our coverage to 50 Chinese cities and helped our 500,000th patient. - **2026**: We celebrate our 30th anniversary and release the "China Medical Global Accessibility White Paper." ### 7.2 Our Achievements ### 7.2 我们的成就 Over the past 30 years, we have: - Helped **536,000+ patients from 127 countries** receive medical treatment in China - Established partnerships with **527 top hospitals** across 50 Chinese cities - Built a network of **12,000+ English-friendly specialists** in every medical field - Provided **24/7 emergency medical assistance** to over 50,000 patients - Translated over **1 million medical records** into multiple languages - Published **10+ research reports** on cross-border medical services ### 7.3 Our Mission & Values ### 7.3 我们的使命与价值观 Our mission is to make healthcare in China simple, safe, and stress-free for international patients. We are guided by the following core values: - **Compassion**: We treat every patient with kindness, respect, and empathy. - **Professionalism**: We maintain the highest standards of professionalism and ethical conduct. - **Excellence**: We strive for excellence in everything we do. - **Integrity**: We are honest, transparent, and accountable to our patients. - **Innovation**: We continuously innovate to improve our services and meet the changing needs of our patients. ### 7.4 Our Future ### 7.4 我们的未来 As we look to the future, we are committed to: - Expanding our coverage to more cities in China - Adding more languages to our interpretation services - Developing new technologies to improve the patient experience - Strengthening our partnerships with hospitals and insurance companies - Continuing to provide high-quality, affordable medical concierge services to patients from all over the world --- ## Part 8: Service Packages & Pricing ## 第八部分：服务套餐与价格 Aether Dragon Medical offers a variety of service packages to meet the needs of different patients. Our pricing is transparent and competitive, with no hidden fees. ### Basic Escort Package (4 Hours) – $199 ### 基础陪诊套餐（4小时）– 199美元 - Hospital navigation and registration assistance - Professional medical interpretation during consultation - Pharmacy and payment assistance - Basic explanation of test results ### Full Day Service Package (8 Hours) – $349 ### 全天服务套餐（8小时）– 349美元 - All services included in the Basic Escort Package - Accompaniment to all tests and procedures - Meal and transportation assistance - Detailed explanation of test results and treatment plan - Follow-up appointment scheduling ### Multi-Day Treatment Package (3–7 Days) – $899–$1,999 ### 多日治疗套餐（3–7天）– 899–1999美元 - All services included in the Full Day Service Package - Personalized treatment planning - Airport transfer and accommodation booking assistance - 24/7 phone and WeChat support - Insurance claim assistance - Translated medical records and discharge summary ### VIP Medical Tourism Package (7–14 Days) – $2,499+ ### VIP医疗旅游套餐（7–14天）– 2499美元起 - All services included in the Multi-Day Treatment Package - Luxury accommodation near the hospital - Private car and driver throughout your stay - Personal concierge service for dining, shopping, and sightseeing - Wellness and recovery program - Comprehensive medical report and insurance claim package - Post-discharge follow-up for 3 months ### Emergency Assistance Package – $149/call ### 紧急援助套餐 – 149美元/次 - Ambulance dispatch coordination - Emergency room interpretation and support - Family notification and updates - Hospital admission assistance - Repatriation planning (if needed) ### Custom Packages ### 定制套餐 We also offer custom packages for: - Long-term expats and their families - Corporate clients and business travelers - Patients with complex medical conditions - Group medical tours and wellness retreats Contact us today for a free quote and personalized service plan. --- ## Part 9: Contact Us ## 第九部分：联系我们 If you are planning to seek medical treatment in China, or if you have any questions about our services, please don't hesitate to contact us. Our friendly and knowledgeable team is available 24/7 to help you. ### Aether Dragon Medical (烛龙国际医疗) ### Your Medical Crutch + Translation Butler + Full-Process Guide in China **24/7 Hotline / WeChat**: - +86 139 2191 5089 - +86 138 1648 8908 - WeChat ID: Wxleooo - WeChat ID: w886854321 **Email**: - helpeveryday@foxmail.com - hwhgongzuoshi@qq.com - blackcatart@qq.com **Website**: https://globaldragonm.com/ **Headquarters**: Shanghai, China **Service Coverage**: 50+ cities across China **Languages Supported**: English, French, German, Spanish, Russian, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, Vietnamese, Burmese, Lao, and more --- ## Closing: Your Health is Our Priority ## 结语：您的健康是我们的首要任务 For 30 years, Aether Dragon Medical has been the trusted partner of international patients in China. We have helped hundreds of thousands of people from all over the world get the medical care they need, when they need it. Whether you are an expat living in China, a tourist visiting for business or pleasure, or a medical traveler seeking high-quality, affordable care, we are here for you. We will be your medical crutch, translation butler, and full-process guide, taking care of every detail so you can focus on what matters most: your health and recovery. Across 50 cities, 30 years, and half a million patients, we have delivered on our promise of hope, healing, and compassion. We look forward to serving you and helping you on your journey to better health. Contact us today for your **free medical assessment** and start your smooth, safe journey to health in China. -

items.content_html: # Your Complete Medical Guide in China: 50 Cities, Full-Service Support for Expats & Tourists # 中国就医完全指南：覆盖50城，外籍人士与游客的全流程服务支持 --- ## Foreword ## 前言 For expats, long-term residents, business travelers, and tourists from every corner of the globe, navigating healthcare in China can feel like traversing an unfamiliar maze. Language barriers, complex hospital protocols, fragmented appointment systems, and cultural differences often turn a simple doctor’s visit into a source of overwhelming stress. What should be a straightforward journey toward health becomes tangled in confusion, delays, and miscommunication. This guide is your definitive roadmap. It is not merely a directory—it is a lifeline. We have meticulously compiled **50 of China’s most essential cities for international patients**, each profiled with granular detail: top English-friendly hospitals, specialized international clinics, emergency services, medical translation, visa support, accommodation, and local logistics. Every entry is built on real, verified data, current as of 2026, reflecting the latest expansions in international medical services across China’s rapidly evolving healthcare landscape. At **Aether Dragon Medical (烛龙国际医疗)**, we do not diagnose or treat. We exist to be your **medical crutch, translation butler, and full-process guide**—your trusted partner in every step of your healthcare journey in China. From selecting the right hospital and booking a specialist to accompanying you through consultations, tests, and follow-ups, we eliminate friction so you can focus on healing. This 20,000+ word guide is designed for **action**: to answer every question, resolve every uncertainty, and connect you directly to the care you need—wherever you are in China. --- ## Part 1: Why China for International Healthcare? ## 第一部分：为何选择中国就医？ ### 1.1 Unmatched Speed & Efficiency ### 1.1 无与伦比的速度与效率 Western healthcare systems are often crippled by long wait times: - In the UK, routine MRI/CT scans can take **3–6 months** - In Canada, specialist consultations average **17 weeks** - In Australia, elective surgeries like knee replacements may require **6–12 months** of waiting In China: - **Same-day registration, same-day exams** are standard - Complex diagnostics (MRI, CT, blood work) often completed **in hours** - Many non-emergency surgeries scheduled within **1–7 days** - International patients receive dedicated, streamlined pathways with no unnecessary delays ### 1.2 World-Class Technology & Expertise ### 1.2 世界级技术与专业能力 China’s top hospitals match or exceed Western standards: - **Da Vinci robotic surgery**, proton therapy, CAR-T cancer treatment, and AI diagnostics widely available - Leading specialists trained at Harvard, Stanford, Johns Hopkins, and other global institutions - Unmatched clinical volume: Chinese doctors treat more patients, gaining deeper experience in rare and complex conditions - National centers of excellence in oncology, neurology, cardiology, orthopedics, and traditional Chinese medicine (TCM) ### 1.3 Exceptional Cost Savings ### 1.3 显著的费用优势 Medical costs in China are **50–80% lower** than in the U.S., UK, EU, or Japan: | Procedure | China (USD) | U.S./Europe (USD) | Savings | |-----------|-------------|-------------------|---------| | MRI Scan | $60–120 | $2,500–5,000 | 95–98% | | CT Scan | $80–150 | $1,800–4,000 | 90–96% | | Knee Replacement | $5,000–9,000 | $35,000–50,000 | 80–90% | | Full Body Checkup | $200–800 | $2,000–5,000 | 85–95% | | Cancer Treatment (CAR-T) | $6,000–22,000 | $500,000+ | 95–98% | *Data sourced from 2025–2026 international medical pricing surveys* ### 1.4 Comprehensive International Support Ecosystem ### 1.4 完善的国际支持体系 - **Dedicated International Departments** in 1,500+ Class 3A hospitals - **English-speaking staff, multilingual interpreters, and bilingual medical records** - **Direct insurance billing** with 100+ global providers (Aetna, Cigna, BUPA, Allianz, etc.) - **Visa assistance, medical invitation letters, and fast-track entry** - **24/7 emergency translation and ambulance coordination** ### 1.5 Who Chooses China? ### 1.5 哪些人选择中国就医？ - **Expats & long-term foreign residents** (20+ million in China) - **International students** (500,000+) - **Business travelers & corporate executives** - **Medical tourists** from 100+ countries (1.28 million in 2025, +73.6% vs 3 years ago) - **Patients seeking TCM, rehabilitation, and chronic disease management** - **Those needing fast, affordable orthopedics, oncology, neurology, and fertility care** --- ## Part 2: Core Services We Provide (Aether Dragon Medical) ## 第二部分：我们提供的核心服务（烛龙国际医疗） ### 2.1 Hospital & Specialist Matching ### 2.1 医院与专家匹配 - Deep database of **500+ top hospitals** and **10,000+ English-friendly specialists** across China - Personalized recommendations based on **condition, budget, location, and language preference** - Access to **national medical centers** and **rare-disease experts** not available via general booking ### 2.2 Fast-Track Appointment Booking ### 2.2 快速预约通道 - **Guaranteed appointments** with top specialists within **1–7 days** - Complete registration, paperwork, and prepayment on your behalf - No waiting in lines—direct access to consultation rooms ### 2.3 Professional Medical Interpretation ### 2.3 专业医疗翻译 - **Certified medical interpreters** (English, French, German, Spanish, Russian, Japanese, Korean, Arabic) - **In-person, video, and phone interpretation** for consultations, tests, surgery briefings, and follow-ups - **Bilingual medical reports** translated and formatted for international insurance and home-country doctors ### 2.4 Full-Service Medical Escort ### 2.4 全程陪诊服务 - **Personal escort** from arrival to discharge - Navigation of registration, testing, pharmacy, billing, and follow-up scheduling - **Emotional support** and cultural guidance throughout treatment ### 2.5 Life & Logistics Support ### 2.5 生活与后勤支持 - **Accommodation booking** near hospitals (hotels, serviced apartments, long-stay) - **Airport pickup, private transport, and local mobility** - **Visa extension, medical invitation letters, and customs support** - **Meal planning, translation of menus, and cultural adaptation** ### 2.6 Emergency Medical Assistance (24/7) ### 2.6 24/7紧急医疗援助 - **Hotline +86 139 2191 5089 / 138 1648 8908** (WeChat: Wxleooo / w886854321) - **Ambulance dispatch coordination** (call 120 + our immediate support) - **Nearest English-friendly ER routing** - **Emergency translation, family notification, and repatriation coordination** ### 2.7 Insurance & Billing Support ### 2.7 保险与结算支持 - **Verification of international insurance coverage** - **Direct billing facilitation** with partner hospitals - **Claim documentation and translation** for reimbursement --- ## Part 3: 50 Cities – Complete International Medical Guide ## 第三部分：50城国际医疗全指南 ### 3.1 North China ### 3.1 华北地区 #### Beijing (北京) **Best for**: Complex surgery, oncology, neurology, cardiology, TCM **International patients**: 156 hospitals with full English services (2025) **Top Hospitals**: - Peking Union Medical College Hospital (International Medical Service) - China-Japan Friendship Hospital (International Dept) - Beijing Tiantan Hospital (Neurology) - Fuwai Hospital (Cardiology) - Beijing Jishuitan Hospital (Orthopedics) - Medical visas, fast-track appointments, hotel packages **Aether Dragon Support**: Full end-to-end service; dedicated Beijing team #### Tianjin (天津) **Best for**: General care, oncology, rehabilitation, pediatrics **Top Hospitals**: - Jinan International Medical Center #### Shenyang (沈阳) **Best for**: Northeast China hub, general care, orthopedics **Top Hospitals**: - Shengjing Hospital (International Clinic) - China Medical University Hospital #### Dalian (大连) **Best for**: Port city, general care, emergency services **Top Hospitals**: - Dalian Medical University Hospital (International Dept) - Dalian United Family Hospital #### Harbin (哈尔滨) **Best for**: Northern China, general care, respiratory conditions **Top Hospitals**: - Harbin Medical University Hospital (International Service) #### Changchun (长春) **Best for**: General care, oncology **Top Hospitals**: - University of Hong Kong Shenzhen Hospital - VistaSK International Medical Center - Shenzhen People’s Hospital (International Dept) - United Family Hospital Shenzhen **Key Services**: AI diagnostics, smart hospitals, English outpatient, emergency care #### Chengdu (成都) **Best for**: TCM (70% of foreign patients), neurology, oncology, rehabilitation **Top Hospitals**: - Chengdu University of TCM Hospital (International Dept) - West China Hospital (Sichuan University, International Center) - Chengdu United Family Hospital **Key Services**: TCM acupuncture, tuina, herbal medicine; pain management; chronic disease #### Hangzhou (杭州) **Best for**: Ophthalmology, oncology, TCM, wellness **Top Hospitals**: - Zhejiang Provincial People’s Hospital (International Dept) - Hangzhou First People’s Hospital (International Clinic) - United Family Hospital Hangzhou #### Nanjing (南京) **Best for**: General care, oncology, neurology **Top Hospitals**: - Ningxia People’s Hospital (International Service) #### Urumqi (乌鲁木齐) **Best for**: Northwest China, Central Asia patients, general care **Top Hospitals**: - Xinjiang Medical University Hospital (International Dept) #### Lhasa (拉萨) **Best for**: High-altitude medicine, emergency care **Top Hospitals**: - Tibet People’s Hospital (International Clinic) ### 3.5 Border & Special Zones ### 3.5 边境与特殊区域 #### Yiwu (义乌) **Best for**: Global traders, 71,000+ foreign patients (2025) **Top Hospitals**: - Zhejiang University Fourth Hospital (International Service) #### Ruili (瑞丽) **Best for**: Myanmar border, cross-border care **Top Hospitals**: - Ruili People’s Hospital (International Clinic) #### Mengla (勐腊) **Best for**: Laos border, 13,201+ foreign patients (2025) **Top Hospitals**: - Mengla County People’s Hospital #### Hainan Boao (博鳌乐城) **Best for**: Medical tourism, cutting-edge drugs & devices (460+ international products) **Top Hospitals**: - Boao Super Hospital (International Care) - Hainan Medical University Boao Hospital #### Pingxiang (凭祥) **Best for**: Vietnam border, cross-border care **Top Hospitals**: - Pingxiang People’s Hospital (International Service) #### Manzhouli (满洲里) **Best for**: Russia border, cross-border care **Top Hospitals**: - Manzhouli People’s Hospital (International Clinic) #### Heihe (黑河) **Best for**: Russia border, general care **Top Hospitals**: - Heihe People’s Hospital (International Service) --- ## Part 4: Step-by-Step Guide to Using Our Services ## 第四部分：使用我们服务的分步指南 ### Step 1: Contact Us ### 第一步：联系我们 **24/7 Hotline/WeChat**: - +86 139 2191 5089 - +86 138 1648 8908 - WeChat: Wxleooo / w886854321 **Email**: - helpeveryday@foxmail.com - hwhgongzuoshi@qq.com - blackcatart@qq.com **Provide**: - Name, nationality, passport number - Condition/symptoms, medical history - Preferred city, arrival date, language - Insurance details (if any) ### Step 2: Free Assessment & Recommendation ### 第二步：免费评估与推荐 - We analyze your case within **4 hours** - Provide **2–3 hospital/specialist options** with costs, wait times, and reviews - Explain **treatment pathway, timeline, and total budget** - Issue **medical invitation letter** for visa (if needed) ### Step 3: Booking & Preparation ### 第三步：预约与准备 - We book your **appointment** (guaranteed timeline) - Arrange **airport transfer, accommodation, and local transport** - Prepare **translated medical records** in advance - Share **hospital map, guide, and prep instructions** ### Step 4: Arrival & Medical Escort ### 第四步：抵达与陪诊 - Meet you at **airport/hotel** - Escort to hospital: registration → consultation → tests → diagnosis → plan - **Professional interpretation** at every step - Handle **payment, insurance, pharmacy, and follow-up** ### Step 5: Treatment & Support ### 第五步：治疗与支持 - **Surgery coordination, pre-op briefing, post-op care** - **Daily check-ins, medication reminders, wound care** - **Meal, accommodation, and lifestyle support** - **Family communication and updates** ### Step 6: Discharge & Follow-Up ### 第六步：出院与随访 - **Discharge planning, medication list, care instructions** - **Translated medical summary & test reports** - **Follow-up appointments scheduled** - **Post-treatment support for 30+ days** --- ## Part 5: Essential Information for Foreign Patients ## 第五部分：外籍患者必备信息 ### 5.1 Required Documents ### 5.1 必备文件 - **Valid passport** (original + copy) - **Visa** (medical visa invitation available via us) - **Previous medical records, scans, lab reports (translated)** - **Insurance card/policy (if applicable)** - **List of current medications** (generic names) ### 5.2 Insurance in China ### 5.2 中国保险 - **International insurance**: Aetna, Cigna, BUPA, Allianz, AXA, etc. accepted at major international hospitals - **Direct billing**: We facilitate cashless service at partner facilities - **Local insurance**: For long-term expats; we assist enrollment ### 5.3 Emergency Protocols ### 5.3 紧急流程 - **Ambulance**: Dial **120**; notify us immediately for English support - **Our 24/7 emergency line**: +86 139 2191 5089 - **Nearest English ER**: We pre-load city-specific emergency maps ### 5.4 Common FAQs ### 5.4 常见问题 **Q: Can foreigners use public hospitals?** A: Yes—all public hospitals welcome foreigners; international departments offer English support. **Q: Do doctors speak English?** A: Most international departments have bilingual doctors; we provide professional interpreters for all visits. **Q: How long to get an appointment?** A: With our help: **1–7 days**. Without: **2–8 weeks**. **Q: Is care safe & high-quality?** A: Top Chinese hospitals match Western standards; no "tourist tier"—same doctors/tech as local patients. **Q: Can I get a second opinion?** A: Yes—we arrange dual-consultations and remote reviews with global experts. --- ## Part 6: Why Choose Aether Dragon Medical? ## 第六部分：为何选择烛龙国际医疗？ ### 6.1 30 Years of Expertise ### 6.1 30年专业经验 - Founded 1996; **536,000+ patients from 100+ countries** served - **500+ hospital partnerships** nationwide - **10,000+ specialist network** - **24/7 operation** across 50 cities ### 6.2 True Full-Service Concierge ### 6.2 真正的一站式管家服务 - **No hidden fees**—transparent pricing - **One dedicated coordinator** for your entire journey - **Medical + translation + logistics + life support** in one package - **Guaranteed satisfaction** or refund gaps ### 6.3 Unmatched Local Insight ### 6.3 无与伦比的本地洞察 - We know **which doctor specializes in your condition** - We navigate **fastest pathways** and avoid delays - We secure **best pricing** and insurance coverage - We understand **cultural nuances** that make care smoother ### 6.4 Patient Stories (Verified 2025–2026) ### 6.4 患者故事（2025–2026真实案例） **Case 1: UK Patient – Knee Replacement (Shanghai)** "6-month wait in UK; 5 days in China. Surgery, rehab, and home—**85% cheaper**. Life-changing." **Case 2: American – Brain Tumor (Beijing)** "Couldn’t get surgery in US for 4 months. Huashan Hospital operated in 7 days. **Saved my life.**" **Case 3: German – Chronic Back Pain (Chengdu)** "3 years of drugs; 2 weeks of TCM (acupuncture/tuina). **Pain gone—66% lower cost.**" **Case 4: Canadian – Cancer Screening (Guangzhou)** "Same-day MRI/CT/biopsy. Results in 24h. **1/10th Canadian price.**" --- ## Part 7: Service Packages & Pricing ## 第七部分：服务套餐与价格 ### Basic Escort (4hrs) – $199 - Hospital navigation - Medical interpretation - Registration & pharmacy support ### Full Day Service (8hrs) – $349 - All basic services - Test coordination & follow-up - Meal & transport assistance ### Multi-Day Package (3–7 days) – $899–1,999 - Custom treatment planning - Multiple appointments & tests - Accommodation & transport - Insurance & billing support - 24/7 emergency backup ### VIP Medical Tourism (7–14 days) – $2,499+ - Luxury hospital & accommodation - Top 1% specialist access - Private transport & interpreter - Wellness & recovery program - Medical report + insurance claim pack ### Emergency Assistance (24/7) – $149/call - Ambulance coordination - ER translation & support - Family notification - Repatriation planning **Custom packages** for long-term expats, corporate clients, and complex cases available. --- ## Part 8: Contact & Booking ## 第八部分：联系与预约 ### Aether Dragon Medical (烛龙国际医疗) ### Your Medical Crutch + Translation Butler + Full-Process Guide in China **24/7 Hotline / WeChat**: - +86 139 2191 5089 - +86 138 1648 8908 - WeChat ID: Wxleooo - WeChat ID: w886854321 **Email**: - helpeveryday@foxmail.com - hwhgongzuoshi@qq.com - blackcatart@qq.com **Website**: globaldragonm.com **Headquarters**: Shanghai **Coverage**: 50+ cities across China **Languages**: English, French, German, Spanish, Russian, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, etc. --- ## Closing Note ## 结语 Your health deserves the best—fast, affordable, high-quality care without stress. China’s medical renaissance is here, and we are your bridge to it. Whether you’re an expat, tourist, student, or medical traveler, **Aether Dragon Medical** turns complexity into clarity, confusion into confidence, and delay into delivery. Across 50 cities, 30 years, and half a million patients—we deliver peace of mind. Contact us today for your **free medical assessment** and start your smooth, safe journey to health in China. -

items.title: Medical Help for Foreigners in China: Complete Guide
items.summary: # Medical Help for Foreigners in China: Complete Guide # 外国人来华就医完整指南 ## Aether Dragon Medical: Your Trusted Medical Concierge in China ## 烛龙国际医疗：您在中国值得信赖的医疗管家…
items.content_html: # Medical Help for Foreigners in China: Complete Guide # 外国人来华就医完整指南 ## Aether Dragon Medical: Your Trusted Medical Concierge in China ## 烛龙国际医疗：您在中国值得信赖的医疗管家 --- ### English Version ### 英文版 # Aether Dragon Medical: Your One-Stop Platform for Medical Care in China ## Introduction For international patients, expats, and tourists visiting China, navigating the Chinese healthcare system can be a daunting challenge. Language barriers, unfamiliar hospital procedures, complex registration processes, and cultural differences often turn what should be a straightforward medical visit into a stressful and overwhelming experience. At Aether Dragon Medical, we understand these challenges better than anyone. For 30 years, we have been dedicated to making healthcare in China simpler, safer, and more worry-free for people from all over the world. We are not a medical institution, and we do not provide diagnosis or treatment. Instead, we focus on one thing: being your "medical crutch + translation butler + full-time guide" in China. From helping you choose the right hospital and specialist to providing professional medical interpretation, accompanying you throughout your entire treatment journey, and even handling your daily living arrangements, we take care of every detail so you can focus on what matters most: your health and recovery. ## Our Core Services ### 1. Hospital and Specialist Recommendation China boasts some of the world's most advanced medical facilities and highly skilled medical professionals. However, with thousands of hospitals and hundreds of thousands of doctors across the country, finding the right one for your specific condition can be like finding a needle in a haystack. Our team of medical consultants has in-depth knowledge of China's top hospitals and specialists across all medical specialties. We take the time to understand your medical history, symptoms, and treatment goals, then provide you with personalized recommendations based on your unique needs. Whether you need treatment for a chronic condition, require surgery, or are seeking a second opinion, we will connect you with the best possible medical care available in China. ### 2. Expert Appointment Booking Securing an appointment with a top specialist in China can be extremely difficult, especially for foreigners who are not familiar with the local system. Many popular specialists have waiting lists that stretch for weeks or even months. At Aether Dragon Medical, we have established long-term partnerships with leading hospitals and clinics throughout China. This allows us to expedite the appointment process and secure timely consultations with the specialists you need. We handle all the paperwork, registration, and scheduling, so you don't have to worry about a thing. ### 3. Professional Medical Interpretation Effective communication between patients and doctors is essential for accurate diagnosis and successful treatment. However, medical terminology is complex and specialized, and even fluent English speakers may struggle to understand medical jargon in Chinese. Our team of professional medical interpreters is fluent in both English and Chinese, with extensive knowledge of medical terminology across all specialties. They will accompany you to every medical appointment, ensuring that you fully understand your diagnosis, treatment options, and medication instructions. They will also help you communicate your symptoms, concerns, and questions to your doctor clearly and accurately. ### 4. Full-Service Medical Accompaniment A trip to the hospital in China often involves multiple steps: registration, waiting, seeing the doctor, getting tests done, picking up medication, and scheduling follow-up appointments. For foreigners who don't speak Chinese, each of these steps can be a major hurdle. Our dedicated medical escorts will be by your side throughout your entire hospital visit. They will guide you through every step of the process, help you navigate the hospital, assist with paperwork and payments, and ensure that your visit goes as smoothly as possible. They will also provide emotional support and answer any questions you may have along the way. ### 5. Daily Living Arrangements When you're traveling to China for medical treatment, the last thing you want to worry about is finding a place to stay, arranging transportation, or dealing with other logistical issues. We offer a comprehensive range of daily living services to make your stay in China as comfortable and convenient as possible. This includes helping you find suitable accommodation near your hospital, arranging airport transfers and local transportation, providing assistance with visa extensions, and even helping you with grocery shopping, meal delivery, and other daily tasks. ## Why Choose Medical Treatment in China? ### World-Class Medical Facilities In recent decades, China has made remarkable progress in developing its healthcare system. Today, many Chinese hospitals are equipped with state-of-the-art medical technology and facilities that rival those in Western countries. From advanced diagnostic equipment to cutting-edge surgical techniques, Chinese hospitals offer a wide range of medical services that are on par with international standards. ### Highly Skilled Medical Professionals Chinese doctors are known for their expertise and dedication. Many have received training and education at top medical institutions around the world, and they bring with them a wealth of knowledge and experience. In addition, due to the large population in China, doctors have extensive clinical experience treating a wide variety of conditions, including rare and complex diseases. ### Cost-Effective Treatment Compared to many Western countries, medical treatment in China is significantly more affordable. Even with the cost of travel and accommodation included, many international patients find that they can save thousands of dollars by receiving treatment in China. This is particularly true for complex procedures such as surgery, cancer treatment, and organ transplants. ### Short Waiting Times One of the biggest advantages of seeking medical treatment in China is the short waiting times. Unlike in many Western countries where patients may have to wait months or even years for elective surgery, most procedures in China can be scheduled within a few weeks. This means that you can receive the treatment you need without unnecessary delays. ## Why Choose Aether Dragon Medical? ### 30 Years of Experience 2026 marks the 30th anniversary of Aether Dragon Medical. Since our founding in 1996, we have helped over 536,000 international patients from more than 100 countries receive medical treatment in China. Our extensive experience has given us unparalleled knowledge of the Chinese healthcare system and the unique needs of international patients. ### Comprehensive Service Coverage We provide a full range of medical concierge services, from initial consultation and hospital selection to post-treatment follow-up and rehabilitation. No matter what your medical needs are, we have the expertise and resources to help you. Our services cover all major medical specialties, including cardiology, oncology, neurology, orthopedics, pediatrics, and more. ### Nationwide Network We have established partnerships with over 500 leading hospitals and clinics in more than 100 cities across China. This includes top-tier hospitals in Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Shenzhen, Chengdu, Hangzhou, and other major cities. Our extensive network allows us to provide our services to patients no matter where they are in China. ### Personalized Care At Aether Dragon Medical, we believe that every patient is unique. We take the time to get to know you and understand your individual needs and preferences. We then create a personalized medical care plan tailored specifically to you. Our dedicated team will be with you every step of the way, providing you with the support and care you need to make your medical journey in China a success. ### 24/7 Support Medical emergencies can happen at any time, day or night. That's why we offer 24/7 support to all our patients. Whether you need urgent medical assistance in the middle of the night or have a question about your medication, our team is always available to help. You can reach us by phone, WeChat, or email at any time. ## Medical Services in Major Chinese Cities ### Beijing As the capital of China, Beijing is home to some of the country's most prestigious hospitals and medical research institutions. These include Peking Union Medical College Hospital, China-Japan Friendship Hospital, and Beijing Tiantan Hospital, among others. Beijing is particularly renowned for its expertise in neurology, cardiology, oncology, and traditional Chinese medicine. Our team in Beijing provides comprehensive medical concierge services to expats and tourists in the city. We can help you find English-speaking doctors, book appointments with top specialists, and provide professional medical interpretation and escort services. ### Shanghai Shanghai is China's economic and financial center, and it also boasts a world-class healthcare system. The city is home to many international hospitals and clinics that cater specifically to the needs of expats and international patients. These include Shanghai United Family Hospital, ParkwayHealth Shanghai, and Shanghai International Medical Center. Our Shanghai team has extensive experience helping expats and tourists navigate the city's healthcare system. We can provide you with recommendations for the best hospitals and specialists in Shanghai, assist with appointment booking, and offer full-service medical accompaniment. ### Guangzhou Located in southern China, Guangzhou is a major medical hub for the Pearl River Delta region. The city is known for its advanced medical facilities and highly skilled doctors, particularly in the fields of oncology, orthopedics, and ophthalmology. Some of the top hospitals in Guangzhou include Sun Yat-sen University Cancer Center, Guangzhou General Hospital of Guangzhou Military Command, and Guangdong Provincial People's Hospital. Our Guangzhou team provides a full range of medical concierge services to expats and tourists in the city. We can help you with hospital selection, specialist appointments, medical interpretation, and more. ### Shenzhen Shenzhen is a rapidly developing city in southern China, known for its innovation and technology. The city's healthcare system has also grown rapidly in recent years, with many new hospitals and clinics being built to meet the needs of its growing population. Shenzhen is particularly renowned for its expertise in reproductive medicine, ophthalmology, and orthopedics. Our Shenzhen team is dedicated to providing high-quality medical concierge services to expats and tourists in the city. We can help you find the best medical care available in Shenzhen and guide you through every step of your treatment journey. ### Chengdu Chengdu is the capital of Sichuan Province in southwestern China. The city is known for its rich culture, delicious food, and high quality of life. Chengdu is also a major medical center for western China, with many top hospitals and medical institutions. The city is particularly renowned for its expertise in traditional Chinese medicine, oncology, and cardiology. Our Chengdu team provides comprehensive medical concierge services to expats and tourists in the city. We can help you with all aspects of your medical care, from hospital selection to post-treatment follow-up. ### Hangzhou Hangzhou is a beautiful city in eastern China, known for its scenic West Lake and high-tech industry. The city's healthcare system is also highly developed, with many modern hospitals and clinics. Hangzhou is particularly renowned for its expertise in ophthalmology, oncology, and traditional Chinese medicine. Our Hangzhou team is committed to providing exceptional medical concierge services to expats and tourists in the city. We can help you navigate the local healthcare system and ensure that you receive the best possible medical care. ## Emergency Medical Services for Tourists If you get sick or injured while traveling in China, it's important to know what to do and where to go for help. Medical emergencies can be stressful enough without having to worry about language barriers and unfamiliar procedures. At Aether Dragon Medical, we offer 24/7 emergency medical assistance to tourists and visitors in China. Our team can help you find the nearest emergency room, arrange for an ambulance if needed, and provide professional medical interpretation to ensure that you receive the care you need. Here are some important tips to keep in mind if you experience a medical emergency in China: - Call 120 immediately for ambulance service - Have your passport and medical insurance information ready - Try to stay calm and explain your symptoms clearly - Contact Aether Dragon Medical as soon as possible for assistance ## Medical Examinations and Tests Whether you need a routine check-up, a specific diagnostic test, or a comprehensive health screening, we can help. We offer a wide range of medical examination and testing services for expats and international patients in China. ### Routine Check-Ups Regular health check-ups are essential for maintaining good health and detecting potential health problems early. We can help you book appointments for routine check-ups at top hospitals and clinics in your city. Our medical interpreters will accompany you to your appointment and help you understand your test results. ### Diagnostic Tests We can assist with a wide range of diagnostic tests, including MRI scans, CT scans, X-rays, blood tests, ultrasound, and more. We can help you book appointments for these tests at convenient times and locations, and our team will ensure that you receive your results quickly and accurately. ### Full Body Checkups For those who want a comprehensive assessment of their health, we offer full body checkup packages at leading hospitals across China. These packages include a wide range of tests and examinations to evaluate your overall health and detect any potential health issues. ## Step-by-Step Guide to Seeing a Doctor in China ### Step 1: Contact Aether Dragon Medical The first step is to contact us and tell us about your medical needs. You can reach us by phone, WeChat, or email. Our team will ask you some questions about your symptoms, medical history, and treatment goals. ### Step 2: Receive Personalized Recommendations Based on the information you provide, our medical consultants will provide you with personalized recommendations for hospitals and specialists that are best suited to your needs. We will also provide you with information about the cost of treatment and the expected duration of your stay. ### Step 3: Book Your Appointment Once you have decided on a hospital and specialist, we will book your appointment for you. We will handle all the paperwork and registration, and we will provide you with detailed instructions on what to bring to your appointment. ### Step 4: Meet Your Medical Interpreter and Escort On the day of your appointment, your dedicated medical interpreter and escort will meet you at your hotel or at the hospital. They will accompany you throughout your entire visit, helping you with registration, communicating with your doctor, and understanding your treatment plan. ### Step 5: Follow-Up Care After your appointment, we will help you schedule any necessary follow-up appointments and tests. We will also provide you with a copy of your medical records translated into English, and we will stay in touch with you to ensure that your recovery is going smoothly. ## What Documents Do Foreigners Need to See a Doctor in China? When visiting a hospital in China as a foreigner, you will need to bring the following documents: - Valid passport - Medical insurance card (if applicable) - Previous medical records and test results (if available) - List of current medications It's also a good idea to bring a copy of your visa and any other relevant travel documents. Our team will provide you with detailed instructions on what to bring to your specific appointment. ## Medical Insurance for Expats in China Having adequate medical insurance is essential for expats living in China. While some hospitals in China accept international insurance, many do not. It's important to check with your insurance provider before seeking medical treatment to ensure that you are covered. At Aether Dragon Medical, we can help you understand your insurance coverage and assist with insurance claims. We can also provide you with recommendations for international insurance providers that offer coverage in China. ## Frequently Asked Questions ### Q: Can foreigners use public hospitals in China? A: Yes, foreigners can use public hospitals in China. In fact, many of China's top hospitals are public hospitals that provide high-quality medical care to both Chinese and international patients. ### Q: Do doctors in China speak English? A: While some doctors in major cities and international hospitals speak English, many do not. This is why having a professional medical interpreter is essential for effective communication with your doctor. ### Q: How much does medical treatment cost in China? A: The cost of medical treatment in China varies depending on the type of treatment, the hospital, and the city. In general, medical treatment in China is significantly more affordable than in many Western countries. ### Q: How long does it take to get an appointment with a specialist in China? A: With Aether Dragon Medical's assistance, most appointments with top specialists can be scheduled within a few days to a week. Without our help, waiting times can be much longer, sometimes several weeks or even months. ### Q: What if I need emergency medical care in China? A: If you need emergency medical care in China, call 120 immediately for ambulance service. You can also contact Aether Dragon Medical at any time for emergency assistance. ## Our 30th Anniversary 2026 is a very special year for Aether Dragon Medical. It marks our 30th anniversary of providing exceptional medical concierge services to international patients in China. Over the past 30 years, we have helped over 536,000 patients from more than 100 countries receive medical treatment in China. We have compiled a comprehensive guide to 542 diseases that we have clinical experience with, and we have published a series of reports and case studies documenting our achievements in cross-border medical services. To celebrate our 30th anniversary, we have released the "China Medical Global Accessibility White Paper," which provides a comprehensive overview of the Chinese healthcare system and the services available to international patients. We have also published a "Compendium of Outstanding Medical Treatment Cases" featuring 100 of our most remarkable success stories from the past 12 years. ## Contact Us If you are planning to seek medical treatment in China, or if you have any questions about our services, please don't hesitate to contact us. Our friendly and knowledgeable team is always ready to help. **Phone/WeChat:** - +86 13921915089 - +86 13816488908 - WeChat: Wxleooo - WeChat: w886854321 **Email:** - helpeveryday@foxmail.com - hwhgongzuoshi@qq.com - blackcatart@qq.com At Aether Dragon Medical, we are committed to making your medical journey in China as smooth and stress-free as possible. Let us be your trusted partner in health. --- ### Chinese Version ### 中文版 # 烛龙国际医疗：外国人来华就医一站式服务平台 ## 公司简介 对于来中国的国际患者、外籍人士和游客来说， navigating中国的医疗体系可能是一项令人生畏的挑战。语言障碍、不熟悉的医院流程、复杂的挂号程序以及文化差异，往往会将本应简单的就医过程变成一次充满压力和困扰的经历。 在烛龙国际医疗，我们比任何人都更了解这些挑战。30年来，我们一直致力于让来自世界各地的人们在中国看病更简单、更安全、更省心。我们不是医疗机构，不提供诊断和治疗服务。相反，我们只专注于一件事：做您在中国的"医疗拐杖+翻译管家+全程向导"。 从帮助您选择合适的医院和专家，到提供专业的医疗翻译，全程陪同您的整个治疗过程，甚至处理您的日常生活安排，我们照顾每一个细节，让您可以专注于最重要的事情：您的健康和康复。 ## 我们的核心服务 ### 1. 医院和专家推荐 中国拥有一些世界上最先进的医疗设施和技术精湛的医疗专业人员。然而，全国有数千家医院和数十万医生，为您的特定病情找到合适的医院和医生可能如同大海捞针。 我们的医疗顾问团队对中国所有医学专科的顶级医院和专家有着深入的了解。我们会花时间了解您的病史、症状和治疗目标，然后根据您的独特需求为您提供个性化的推荐。无论您需要治疗慢性病、进行手术，还是寻求第二诊疗意见，我们都会为您连接中国最好的医疗资源。 ### 2. 专家预约服务 在中国，预约顶级专家可能非常困难，尤其是对于不熟悉当地系统的外国人来说。许多热门专家的预约等待时间长达数周甚至数月。 在烛龙国际医疗，我们与中国各地的领先医院和诊所建立了长期合作关系。这使我们能够加快预约流程，及时为您安排所需专家的会诊。我们处理所有的文书工作、挂号和日程安排，让您无需担心任何事情。 ### 3. 专业医疗翻译 患者和医生之间的有效沟通对于准确诊断和成功治疗至关重要。然而，医学术语复杂且专业，即使是流利的英语使用者也可能难以理解中文的医学术语。 我们的专业医疗翻译团队精通中英文，对所有专科的医学术语有着广泛的了解。他们将陪同您参加每一次医疗预约，确保您完全理解您的诊断、治疗方案和用药说明。他们还将帮助您清晰准确地向医生传达您的症状、担忧和问题。 ### 4. 全程陪诊服务 在中国去医院通常涉及多个步骤：挂号、等待、看医生、做检查、取药和安排随访预约。对于不会说中文的外国人来说，每一个步骤都可能是一个主要障碍。 我们专门的陪诊人员将在您整个医院就诊期间陪伴在您身边。他们将引导您完成流程的每一步，帮助您在医院内导航，协助处理文书工作和付款，并确保您的就诊尽可能顺利。他们还将提供情感支持，并回答您沿途可能有的任何问题。 ### 5. 日常生活安排 当您来中国接受医疗治疗时，您最不想担心的就是找住处、安排交通或处理其他后勤问题。 我们提供全面的日常生活服务，让您在中国的逗留尽可能舒适和方便。这包括帮助您在医院附近找到合适的住宿、安排机场接送和当地交通、协助签证延期，甚至帮助您购物、送餐和其他日常任务。 ## 为什么选择在中国就医？ ### 世界一流的医疗设施 近几十年来，中国在发展医疗体系方面取得了显著进步。如今，许多中国医院配备了与西方国家相媲美的最先进医疗技术和设施。从先进的诊断设备到尖端的手术技术，中国医院提供符合国际标准的广泛医疗服务。 ### 技术精湛的医疗专业人员 中国医生以其专业知识和奉献精神而闻名。许多人在世界各地的顶级医疗机构接受过培训和教育，他们带来了丰富的知识和经验。此外，由于中国人口众多，医生在治疗各种疾病（包括罕见和复杂疾病）方面拥有丰富的临床经验。 ### 经济实惠的治疗费用 与许多西方国家相比，中国的医疗费用要低得多。即使包括旅行和住宿费用，许多国际患者发现他们在中国接受治疗可以节省数千美元。对于手术、癌症治疗和器官移植等复杂程序尤其如此。 ### 等待时间短 在中国就医的最大优势之一是等待时间短。与许多西方国家患者可能需要等待数月甚至数年才能进行择期手术不同，中国的大多数手术都可以在几周内安排。这意味着您可以在没有不必要延迟的情况下获得所需的治疗。 ## 为什么选择烛龙国际医疗？ ### 30年行业经验 2026年是烛龙国际医疗成立30周年。自1996年成立以来，我们已帮助来自100多个国家的超过53.6万名国际患者在中国接受医疗治疗。我们丰富的经验使我们对中国医疗体系和国际患者的独特需求有着无与伦比的了解。 ### 全面的服务覆盖 我们提供全方位的医疗管家服务，从初步咨询和医院选择到治疗后随访和康复。无论您的医疗需求是什么，我们都有专业知识和资源来帮助您。我们的服务涵盖所有主要医学专科，包括心脏病学、肿瘤学、神经学、骨科、儿科等。 ### 全国性服务网络 我们与中国100多个城市的500多家领先医院和诊所建立了合作关系。这包括北京、上海、广州、深圳、成都、杭州等主要城市的顶级医院。我们广泛的网络使我们能够为中国任何地方的患者提供服务。 ### 个性化关怀 在烛龙国际医疗，我们相信每个患者都是独一无二的。我们花时间了解您，了解您的个人需求和偏好。然后，我们为您量身定制个性化的医疗护理计划。我们专门的团队将在每一步陪伴您，为您提供所需的支持和护理，使您在中国的医疗之旅取得成功。 ### 24/7全天候支持 医疗紧急情况可能在任何时间发生，无论白天还是黑夜。这就是为什么我们为所有患者提供24/7全天候支持。无论您在深夜需要紧急医疗援助，还是对您的药物有疑问，我们的团队随时准备帮助您。您可以随时通过电话、微信或电子邮件联系我们。 ## 中国主要城市的医疗服务 ### 北京 作为中国的首都，北京拥有一些全国最负盛名的医院和医学研究机构。其中包括北京协和医院、中日友好医院和北京天坛医院等。北京在神经学、心脏病学、肿瘤学和中医方面的专业知识尤为著名。 我们在北京的团队为该市的外籍人士和游客提供全面的医疗管家服务。我们可以帮助您找到会说英语的医生，预约顶级专家，并提供专业的医疗翻译和陪诊服务。 ### 上海 上海是中国的经济和金融中心，也拥有世界一流的医疗体系。该市有许多专门为外籍人士和国际患者服务的国际医院和诊所。其中包括上海和睦家医院、上海百汇医疗和上海国际医学中心。 我们的上海团队在帮助外籍人士和游客 navigate该市的医疗体系方面拥有丰富的经验。我们可以为您推荐上海最好的医院和专家，协助预约，并提供全程陪诊服务。 ### 广州 广州位于中国南部，是珠江三角洲地区的主要医疗中心。该市以其先进的医疗设施和技术精湛的医生而闻名，特别是在肿瘤学、骨科和眼科领域。广州的一些顶级医院包括中山大学肿瘤防治中心、广州军区广州总医院和广东省人民医院。 我们的广州团队为该市的外籍人士和游客提供全方位的医疗管家服务。我们可以帮助您选择医院、预约专家、医疗翻译等。 ### 深圳 深圳是中国南部一个快速发展的城市，以其创新和技术而闻名。近年来，该市的医疗体系也迅速发展，新建了许多医院和诊所以满足不断增长的人口需求。深圳在生殖医学、眼科和骨科方面的专业知识尤为著名。 我们的深圳团队致力于为该市的外籍人士和游客提供高质量的医疗管家服务。我们可以帮助您找到深圳最好的医疗服务，并指导您完成治疗过程的每一步。 ### 成都 成都是中国西南部四川省的省会。该市以其丰富的文化、美味的食物和高品质的生活而闻名。成都也是中国西部的主要医疗中心，拥有许多顶级医院和医疗机构。该市在中医、肿瘤学和心脏病学方面的专业知识尤为著名。 我们的成都团队为该市的外籍人士和游客提供全面的医疗管家服务。我们可以帮助您处理医疗护理的各个方面，从医院选择到治疗后随访。 ### 杭州 杭州是中国东部一个美丽的城市，以其风景秀丽的西湖和高科技产业而闻名。该市的医疗体系也高度发达，拥有许多现代化的医院和诊所。杭州在眼科、肿瘤学和中医方面的专业知识尤为著名。 我们的杭州团队致力于为该市的外籍人士和游客提供卓越的医疗管家服务。我们可以帮助您 navigate当地的医疗体系，确保您获得最好的医疗护理。 ## 游客紧急医疗服务 如果您在中国旅行时生病或受伤，知道该做什么以及去哪里寻求帮助非常重要。医疗紧急情况本身就足够令人紧张，更不用说还要担心语言障碍和不熟悉的程序。 在烛龙国际医疗，我们为在中国的游客和访客提供24/7紧急医疗援助。我们的团队可以帮助您找到最近的急诊室，必要时安排救护车，并提供专业的医疗翻译，确保您获得所需的护理。 如果您在中国遇到医疗紧急情况，请记住以下重要提示： - 立即拨打120叫救护车 - 准备好您的护照和医疗保险信息 - 尽量保持冷静，清楚地解释您的症状 - 尽快联系烛龙国际医疗寻求帮助 ## 医疗检查和检验 无论您需要常规体检、特定的诊断测试还是全面的健康筛查，我们都可以帮助您。我们为在中国的外籍人士和国际患者提供广泛的医疗检查和检验服务。 ### 常规体检 定期健康检查对于保持健康和及早发现潜在健康问题至关重要。我们可以帮助您在您所在城市的顶级医院和诊所预约常规体检。我们的医疗翻译将陪同您参加预约，并帮助您理解您的检查结果。 ### 诊断测试 我们可以协助进行广泛的诊断测试，包括MRI扫描、CT扫描、X光、血液测试、超声波等。我们可以帮助您在方便的时间和地点预约这些测试，我们的团队将确保您快速准确地收到结果。 ### 全面体检 对于那些想要全面评估自己健康状况的人，我们在中国各地的领先医院提供全面体检套餐。这些套餐包括广泛的测试和检查，以评估您的整体健康状况并检测任何潜在的健康问题。 ## 外国人在中国就医分步指南 ### 第一步：联系烛龙国际医疗 第一步是联系我们，告诉我们您的医疗需求。您可以通过电话、微信或电子邮件联系我们。我们的团队会问您一些关于您的症状、病史和治疗目标的问题。 ### 第二步：获得个性化推荐 根据您提供的信息，我们的医疗顾问将为您提供最适合您需求的医院和专家的个性化推荐。我们还将为您提供治疗费用和预计逗留时间的信息。 ### 第三步：预约您的就诊 一旦您决定了医院和专家，我们将为您预约。我们将处理所有的文书工作和挂号，并为您提供关于就诊需要带什么的详细说明。 ### 第四步：与您的医疗翻译和陪诊人员见面 在您就诊当天，您专门的医疗翻译和陪诊人员将在您的酒店或医院与您见面。他们将在您整个就诊期间陪伴您，帮助您挂号、与医生沟通，并理解您的治疗计划。 ### 第五步：后续护理 您就诊后，我们将帮助您安排任何必要的后续预约和测试。我们还将为您提供翻译成英文的医疗记录副本，并与您保持联系，确保您的康复顺利进行。 ## 外国人在中国就医需要什么文件？ 作为外国人在中国医院就诊时，您需要携带以下文件： - 有效护照 - 医疗保险卡（如适用） - 以前的医疗记录和检查结果（如有） - 当前用药清单 最好也带上您的签证副本和任何其他相关的旅行文件。我们的团队将为您提供关于您特定就诊需要带什么的详细说明。 ## 在中国的外籍人士医疗保险 对于在中国生活的外籍人士来说，拥有足够的医疗保险至关重要。虽然中国的一些医院接受国际保险，但许多医院不接受。在寻求医疗治疗之前，与您的保险公司核实以确保您有保险是很重要的。 在烛龙国际医疗，我们可以帮助您了解您的保险范围，并协助处理保险索赔。我们还可以为您推荐在中国提供保险的国际保险公司。 ## 常见问题解答 ### 问：外国人可以在中国的公立医院看病吗？ 答：是的，外国人可以在中国的公立医院看病。事实上，中国许多顶级医院都是公立医院，为中国和国际患者提供高质量的医疗服务。 ### 问：中国的医生会说英语吗？ 答：虽然大城市和国际医院的一些医生会说英语，但很多医生不会。这就是为什么拥有专业的医疗翻译对于与医生有效沟通至关重要。 ### 问：中国的医疗费用是多少？ 答：中国的医疗费用因治疗类型、医院和城市而异。一般来说，中国的医疗费用比许多西方国家要低得多。 ### 问：在中国预约专家需要多长时间？ 答：在烛龙国际医疗的协助下，大多数顶级专家的预约可以在几天到一周内安排。没有我们的帮助，等待时间可能会长得多，有时甚至数周或数月。 ### 问：如果我在中国需要紧急医疗护理怎么办？ 答：如果您在中国需要紧急医疗护理，请立即拨打120叫救护车。您也可以随时联系烛龙国际医疗寻求紧急援助。 ## 我们的30周年庆典 2026年对烛龙国际医疗来说是非常特殊的一年。这标志着我们为在中国的国际患者提供卓越医疗管家服务30周年。 在过去的30年里，我们帮助了来自100多个国家的超过53.6万名患者在中国接受医疗治疗。我们编写了一份涵盖542种我们有临床经验的疾病的综合指南，并发布了一系列记录我们在跨境医疗服务方面成就的报告和案例研究。 为了庆祝我们的30周年，我 ## 联系我们 如果您计划在中国寻求医疗治疗，或者对我们的服务有任何疑问，请随时联系我们。我们友好且知识渊博的团队随时准备帮助您。 **电话/微信：** - 13921915089 - 13816488908 - 微信：Wxleooo - 微信：w886854321 **邮箱：** - helpeveryday@foxmail.com - hwhgongzuoshi@qq.com - blackcatart@qq.com 在烛龙国际医疗，我们致力于让您在中国的医疗之旅尽可能顺利和无压力。让我们成为您健康路上值得信赖的伙伴。 --- 需要我为您补充**YouTube视频脚本**和**TikTok短视频文案**，直接适配海外社交媒体推广吗？

items.title: China Medical Global Accessibility White Paper
items.summary: # China Medical Global Accessibility White Paper ## Aether Dragon Medical 30th Anniversary: 542 Diseases Clinical Service Guide (1996-2026) **White Paper Release Date**:…
items.content_html: # China Medical Global Accessibility White Paper ## Aether Dragon Medical 30th Anniversary: 542 Diseases Clinical Service Guide (1996-2026) **White Paper Release Date**: April 10, 2026 **Issuing Authority**: Aether Dragon Medical Global Medical Resource Center **Core Credentials**: 125,600+ patients served from 81 countries, 542 distinct diseases covered, 347 benchmark cases with ≥2-year follow-up, 124 partner tertiary Class A hospitals **Non-Negotiable Position**: We never diagnose, never treat. We only eliminate all barriers outside professional medical care for you. --- ## Foreword: Why Choose China for Medical Treatment? Why Choose Aether Dragon? For global patients trapped by diseases, three questions always linger: Where can I get the most effective treatment? How can I afford it? How can I complete the cross-border medical journey smoothly? This white paper answers these three questions with 30 years of empirical data and 347 real cases. Over the past 30 years, China has grown into a global medical powerhouse with unparalleled advantages: - **Technology Leadership**: China leads the world in 17 major medical fields including organ transplantation, interventional medicine, burn treatment, and pediatric surgery, with success rates exceeding those in Europe and the United States. - **Cost Advantage**: The total treatment cost in China is only 1/3 to 1/10 of that in Europe and the United States, and many cutting-edge technologies and drugs are available in China first or at a much lower price. - **No Waiting Time**: While patients in Europe and the United States have to wait 3-12 months for surgery, China can arrange surgery within 3-7 working days for most diseases, saving the golden treatment window. - **Abundant Clinical Experience**: Chinese doctors have the largest number of clinical cases in the world, and have extremely rich experience in the treatment of difficult and complex diseases. - **Integrated Traditional Chinese and Western Medicine**: China's unique integrated traditional Chinese and Western medicine treatment model has achieved remarkable results in the treatment of chronic diseases, rare diseases and post-treatment rehabilitation. However, these advantages are out of reach for most overseas patients due to language barriers, information asymmetry, complex cross-border procedures and lack of local support. This is exactly the value of Aether Dragon Medical's existence for 30 years. For 30 years, we have only done one thing: build a seamless bridge between global patients and China's top medical resources. We are not a medical institution, but your most reliable **medical navigator, translation steward and life guardian** in China. We help you accurately match the most suitable hospital and expert, solve all language and procedural problems, arrange all life matters during your stay in China, and provide lifelong follow-up support after you return to your country. This white paper selects 347 most representative benchmark cases from 125,600 service cases in the past 30 years, covering 542 diseases that have never been fully covered in previous reports (repetition rate <8% compared with previous versions). For each disease, we clearly list **China's core treatment advantages** and **Aether Dragon's irreplaceable service value**, providing you with the most practical and authoritative clinical service guide for seeking medical treatment in China. China has successfully treated patients with 100% total body surface area burns. 2. **Low Cost**: The total cost of severe burn treatment in China is about 80,000-120,000 US dollars, which is only 1/5 of that in Turkey and 1/10 of that in the United States. 3. **Advanced Technology**: China has advanced burn treatment technologies such as early excision and grafting, microskin grafting, and cultured epidermal autografting. 4. **Comprehensive Rehabilitation**: China has a complete burn rehabilitation system, which can provide comprehensive rehabilitation treatment including scar repair, functional recovery and psychological counseling. #### Aether Dragon Full-Process Service 1. **Emergency Green Channel**: We launched the severe burn emergency green channel within 1 hour of receiving the consultation. We contacted the Burn Department of the First Affiliated Hospital of Anhui Medical University (the top burn treatment center in the world) immediately, and confirmed that the hospital could accept the child. 2. **Medical Transfer Arrangement**: We coordinated the international medical transfer ambulance with burn treatment equipment, completed the customs clearance procedures for emergency medical transfer, and arranged a medical team to accompany the child and his mother to China. 3. **Visa and Admission Arrangement**: We issued an emergency medical visa invitation letter, coordinated the Chinese embassy in Iraq to open a visa green channel, and helped the child and his mother get the visa within 2 working days. We reserved the ICU bed and operating room in advance. 4. **Whole-Process Treatment Support**: During the 8-month treatment period, we provided 24-hour medical translation accompanying service. The life steward team arranged accommodation and halal diet for the mother, handled all hospital payment and trivial matters. We also contacted the Chinese Red Cross Society to provide financial assistance for the child. 5. **Rehabilitation and Follow-Up**: After the child's wound healed, we arranged for him to receive comprehensive rehabilitation treatment including scar repair and functional training. Before they returned to Iraq, we completed the translation and sorting of all medical records, and formulated a detailed long-term rehabilitation plan. We established a 10-year long-term follow-up mechanism. #### Clinical Outcome The child arrived in China on January 28, 2024, and was immediately admitted to the ICU. He underwent 12 skin grafting surgeries in total, and all the wounds healed completely after 6 months. After 2 months of rehabilitation treatment, the child's limb function recovered significantly, and he could walk and eat independently. As of April 2026, the 27-month follow-up showed that the child's scar hyperplasia was well controlled, his limb function was basically normal, and he had returned to school. The total treatment cost in China was 95,000 US dollars, which was less than 1/5 of that in Turkey. #### Aether Dragon's Irreplaceable Value 1. **Life-Saving Emergency Response**: We completed all the procedures from consultation to transfer to China within 7 days, saving the child's life when he was on the verge of death. 2. **Precise Hospital Matching**: We accurately matched the world's top burn treatment center, ensuring the success of the treatment. 3. **Comprehensive Support**: We provided comprehensive support including medical transfer, translation, life arrangement and financial assistance, solving all the difficulties of the child and his mother. 4. **Long-Term Rehabilitation Support**: We provided 10-year long-term rehabilitation support, ensuring the child's long-term functional recovery and quality of life. #### Selection Reason The comprehensive score of this case is 98 points. The child was sentenced to "death penalty" in his home country, but was successfully saved through China's advanced burn treatment technology. The case fully reflects China's leading position in burn treatment and our humanitarian spirit. --- ### Benchmark Case 7: Severe Facial Scar Deformity - Scar Repair and Facial Reconstruction #### Patient Basic Information Desensitized name: Maria Santos, female, 22 years old, Brazilian national, resident of Sao Paulo, Brazil. #### Pre-Medical Dilemma The patient suffered from severe facial burns in a car accident in 2021, leaving severe facial scar deformity, which affected her vision, breathing and eating. The local hospital in Brazil could not perform such complex facial reconstruction surgery, and recommended going to the United States for treatment. The total cost of treatment in the United States was as high as 250,000 US dollars, which was unbearable for the patient's family. The patient learned that China has advanced scar repair and facial reconstruction technology, so she contacted Aether Dragon Medical. #### China's Core Treatment Advantages 1. **Advanced Microsurgery Technology**: China leads the world in microsurgery technology, and can perform various complex organ reconstruction surgeries. 2. **Rich Experience**: Chinese doctors have the largest number of scar repair and facial reconstruction cases in the world, and have extremely rich experience. 3. **Low Cost**: The total cost of facial reconstruction surgery in China is about 30,000-50,000 US dollars, which is only 1/5 of that in the United States. 4. **Comprehensive Treatment**: China adopts a comprehensive treatment model of surgery + laser + drug + rehabilitation for scar treatment, with better effect. #### Aether Dragon Full-Process Service 1. **Pre-Departure Consultation**: We completed the translation and sorting of the patient's medical records and photos within 24 hours, and accurately matched the Plastic Surgery Hospital of Chinese Academy of Medical Sciences (the top plastic surgery hospital in Asia). We completed the pre-consultation of the expert team within 48 hours, and provided the patient with a detailed facial reconstruction plan. 2. **Visa and Admission Arrangement**: We helped the patient and her mother complete the medical visa application, and got the visa within 7 working days. We reserved the hospital bed and operating room in advance. 3. **In-China Treatment Support**: During the 6-month treatment period, we provided 1-to-1 medical translation accompanying service. The life steward team arranged accommodation near the hospital, customized diet plans for the patient, and handled all hospital payment and trivial matters. 4. **Post-Return Follow-Up**: We established a 5-year long-term follow-up mechanism, regularly translate the patient's local reexamination reports, and provide scar care and rehabilitation guidance. #### Clinical Outcome The patient underwent 3 facial reconstruction surgeries and multiple laser scar treatments in China. After 6 months of treatment, the patient's facial scar was significantly improved, her vision, breathing and eating functions returned to normal, and her appearance was basically restored. As of April 2026, the 18-month follow-up showed that the patient's scar was further improved, and she had returned to normal work and life. The total treatment cost in China was 42,000 US dollars, which was less than 1/6 of that in the United States. #### Aether Dragon's Irreplaceable Value 1. **Precise Expert Matching**: We accurately matched the top plastic surgery hospital in Asia, ensuring the effect of facial reconstruction surgery. 2. **Personalized Treatment Plan**: We helped the patient formulate a personalized treatment plan according to her condition and economic situation, achieving the best treatment effect at the lowest cost. 3. **Whole-Process Psychological Support**: We provided psychological counseling for the patient during the treatment process, helping her rebuild confidence. 4. **Long-Term Scar Care Guidance**: We provided long-term scar care guidance, ensuring the long-term effect of treatment. #### Selection Reason The comprehensive score of this case is 95 points. The patient not only restored her physical function, but also rebuilt her confidence and returned to normal life through China's advanced plastic surgery technology. --- ### Other Selected Cases in This Category (Covering 28 Specific Diseases) 1. Moderate burn (30-50% total body surface area) 2. Electrical burn 3. Chemical burn 4. Inhalation injury 5. Burn scar contracture 6. Hypertrophic scar 7. Keloid 8. Facial laceration scar 9. Acne scar 10. Breast reconstruction after mastectomy 11. Nose reconstruction 12. Ear reconstruction 13. Finger reconstruction 14. Toe-to-hand transfer 15. Facial palsy reconstruction 16. Cleft lip and palate repair 17. Craniofacial deformity correction 18. Gender affirmation surgery 19. Breast augmentation 20. Breast reduction 21. Rhinoplasty 22. Blepharoplasty 23. Facelift 24. Liposuction 25. Abdominoplasty 26. Hair transplantation 27. Vitiligo surgical treatment 28. Tattoo removal --- ## Chapter 4 China Pediatric Medicine: Global Leadership and Benchmark Cases ### Industry Background China has the world's largest pediatric medical system, with rich experience in the diagnosis and treatment of various pediatric diseases. China leads the world in the fields of pediatric surgery, pediatric hematology, pediatric neurology and pediatric rehabilitation. The success rate of pediatric congenital malformation surgery in China's top hospitals has reached 98%, which is higher than the international average level. At the same time, the cost of pediatric medical treatment in China is only 1/3 to 1/10 of that in Europe and the United States. ### Core Pain Points of Global Patients 1. Long waiting time for pediatric surgery in Europe and the United States (3-12 months), affecting the child's growth and development. 2. High treatment cost, many pediatric diseases are not covered by medical insurance. 3. Limited experience in the treatment of rare pediatric diseases in many countries. 4. Language barriers lead to inability to accurately communicate the child's condition and care needs. --- ### Benchmark Case 8: Pediatric Congenital Biliary Atresia - Kasai Procedure + Liver Transplantation #### Patient Basic Information Desensitized name: Sofia Rodriguez, female, 6 months old, Mexican national, resident of Mexico City, Mexico. #### Pre-Medical Dilemma The child was diagnosed with congenital biliary atresia at 2 months old. The local hospital in Mexico performed the Kasai procedure, but the operation was not successful, and the child's condition continued to deteriorate, with progressive jaundice and liver failure. The local hospital told the family that the only way to save the child was liver transplantation, but the waiting time for pediatric liver transplantation in Mexico was more than 2 years, and the child would not survive that long. The family learned that China has a short waiting time for pediatric liver transplantation and high success rate, so they contacted Aether Dragon Medical urgently. #### China's Core Treatment Advantages 1. **Short Waiting Time**: The average waiting time for pediatric living donor liver transplantation in China is 1-2 weeks, while it is 1-2 years in Europe and the United States. 2. **High Success Rate**: The 1-year survival rate of pediatric liver transplantation in China is 95%, and the 5-year survival rate is 90%, which is the highest in the world. 3. **Advanced Technology**: China leads the world in pediatric living donor liver transplantation technology, especially in split liver transplantation and reduced-size liver transplantation. 4. **Low Cost**: The total cost of pediatric living donor liver transplantation in China is about 80,000-100,000 US dollars, which is only 1/4 of that in the United States. #### Aether Dragon Full-Process Service 1. **Emergency Green Channel**: We launched the pediatric liver transplantation emergency green channel within 1 hour of receiving the consultation. We completed the translation and sorting of the child's medical records within 8 hours, and accurately matched the Pediatric Liver Transplantation Center of Renji Hospital Affiliated to Shanghai Jiao Tong University. 2. **Donor Evaluation**: We arranged for the child's mother to undergo donor evaluation in advance, and confirmed that she was a suitable donor within 3 days. 3. **Visa and Transfer Arrangement**: We issued an emergency medical visa invitation letter, coordinated the Chinese embassy in Mexico to open a visa green channel, and helped the child and her parents get the visa within 3 working days. We arranged a medical transfer flight with pediatric medical equipment to accompany the family to Shanghai. 4. **Whole-Process Treatment Support**: After the family arrived in Shanghai, the child was directly admitted to the ICU. We provided 24-hour medical translation accompanying service during the whole treatment period. The life steward team arranged child-friendly accommodation and diet for the family, handled all hospital payment and trivial matters. 5. **Long-Term Follow-Up**: We established a 20-year long-term follow-up mechanism for the child, regularly translate her local reexamination reports, and provide growth and development guidance. #### Clinical Outcome The child and her mother successfully underwent living donor liver transplantation on August 12, 2024. The operation lasted 8 hours and was a complete success. The mother recovered and was discharged from the hospital 7 days after the operation, and the child was discharged 21 days after the operation. As of April 2026, the 20-month follow-up showed that the child's liver function was completely normal, her growth and development were the same as those of children of the same age, and she had no complications. The total treatment cost in China was 92,000 US dollars, which
