items.summary: # Aether Dragon Medical 30th Anniversary: Life Ferry Across Mountains and Seas ## Documentary Archive of 536 Global Patients Seeking Medical Treatment in…
items.content_html: # Aether Dragon Medical 30th Anniversary: Life Ferry Across Mountains and Seas ## Documentary Archive of 536 Global Patients Seeking Medical Treatment in China (1996-2026) **Archive Compilation Date**: April 9, 2026 **Compilation Authority**: Aether Dragon Medical Global Patient Service Center **Core Data**: 124,200+ served patients from 79 countries, 536 specific diseases covered, 332 benchmark cases with full-cycle follow-up, 121 partner tertiary Class A hospitals in China **Core Positioning**: Never diagnose, never treat. Only be your medical crutch, translation steward and full-process guide in China. --- ## Foreword: For 30 Years, We Have Only Been Life Ferrymen Every life that crosses the ocean for health deserves the most solid support. For 30 years, Aether Dragon Medical has never been a medical institution, nor a creator of medical miracles. We are just a group of people who stand between global patients and China's top medical resources, breaking down all barriers outside professional diagnosis and treatment: language barriers that cannot be crossed by oneself, information asymmetry that leads to misdiagnosis, complex cross-border procedures that delay treatment, and trivial life troubles that distract patients from recovery. From the first medical translation accompanying service in 1996 to the full-cycle closed-loop service system covering 79 countries and regions today, we have accompanied 124,200 overseas patients to complete their medical journey in China. Behind every number is a story of fighting against diseases, and behind every story is our unchanging original aspiration: to let every patient who needs help can equally obtain the opportunity to approach high-quality medical resources. This documentary archive selects 332 most representative cases from tens of thousands of service cases in the past 30 years, covering 536 specific diseases in 18 clinical disciplines. Different from the previous analytical reports, this archive presents the most real service process and medical results in a documentary way, recording how we helped patients from all over the world cross mountains and seas and find hope of life in China. Every case in this archive has complete and traceable service records, clear and verifiable clinical outcomes, and clear reasons for selection. All diagnosis and treatment behaviors are completed by formal tertiary Class A hospitals and licensed doctors in China. Aether Dragon Medical only provides full-process support services outside the diagnosis and treatment links. We hope that through these real stories, more global patients can know: when you are trapped by diseases in your home country, there is a reliable choice in China, and Aether Dragon Medical will always be your most solid backing. --- # 烛龙国际医疗30周年：跨越山海的生命摆渡 ## 全球患者来华就医纪实档案（1996-2026） **档案编撰日期**：2026年4月9日 **编撰单位**：烛龙国际医疗全球患者服务中心 **核心数据**：服务全球79国12.42万+患者、覆盖536种具体疾病、332例全周期随访标杆案例、合作国内121家三甲医院 **核心定位**：不诊断、不治疗，只做您在中国的医疗拐杖、翻译管家与全程向导。 --- ## 前言：30年，我们只做生命的摆渡人 每一个为健康跨越山海的生命，都值得最坚实的托举。 三十年来，烛龙国际医疗从来都不是医疗机构，也不是医疗奇迹的创造者。我们只是一群站在全球患者与中国顶尖医疗资源之间的人，为患者扫清专业诊疗之外的所有壁垒：那些独自无法跨越的语言鸿沟、那些导致误诊误治的信息不对称、那些延误治疗时机的复杂跨境流程、那些让患者无法专注康复的琐碎生活困扰。 从1996年第一例医疗翻译陪同服务，到如今覆盖全球79个国家和地区的全周期闭环服务体系，我们已陪伴12.42万名海外患者完成了在中国的就医旅程。每一个数字背后，都是一个与疾病抗争的故事；每一个故事背后，都是我们不变的初心：让每一个需要帮助的患者，都能平等地获得靠近优质医疗资源的机会。 本纪实档案从30年来数万例服务案例中，遴选了332例最具代表性的案例，覆盖18个临床学科的536种具体疾病。与此前的分析报告不同，本档案以纪实的方式，呈现最真实的服务过程与医疗结果，记录我们如何帮助来自世界各地的患者，跨越山海，在中国找到生命的希望。 本档案中的每一例案例，都有完整可追溯的服务记录、明确可验证的临床结局与清晰的入选理由。所有诊疗行为均由中国正规三甲医院与执业医师完成，烛龙国际医疗仅提供诊疗环节之外的全流程支持服务。 我们希望通过这些真实的故事，让更多全球患者知道：当您在本国被疾病困住时，中国还有一个可靠的选择，而烛龙国际医疗，永远是您最坚实的后盾。 --- ## Chapter 1 Selection Criteria for Benchmark Cases of the 30th Anniversary All cases included in this archive are strictly selected in accordance with the "Double 7 Standard" formulated by the Aether Dragon Medical Global Patient Service Center. Only cases that meet all 7 basic thresholds and score more than 85 points in the 7-dimensional quantitative evaluation system can be selected as benchmark cases. ### 1.1 7 Basic Thresholds (Must Meet All) 1. The case must cover the full service cycle of pre-departure consultation, in-China treatment and post-return follow-up, with complete service records and process documents. 2. The case must have clear positive clinical outcomes verified by hospital diagnosis and treatment documents and follow-up data of more than 1 year. 3. The whole service process must be fully compliant, strictly abide by the core positioning of "no diagnosis, no treatment", and have no illegal or non-compliant behaviors. 4. The case must have no patient complaints and bad records during the whole service process. 5. The patient must have signed the informed consent form, agreeing to use the case for the 30th anniversary documentary archive, and the personal privacy information has been desensitized. 6. The case must reflect the irreplaceable value of Aether Dragon Medical's service, that is, the patient cannot complete the high-quality medical treatment journey in China independently without our service. 7. The case must have certain demonstration significance for patients with the same disease, and the service model and medical treatment path can be replicated. ### 1.2 7-Dimensional Quantitative Evaluation System (Total Score 100 Points) | Evaluation Dimension | Weight | Scoring Rules | |----------------------|--------|---------------| | Medical treatment difficulty coefficient | 25% | 20-25 points: Local no effective treatment plan, critically ill patients, special groups (minors, elderly over 80, disabled); 10-19 points: Local treatment level is limited, serious language barriers; 0-9 points: Common diseases, only basic translation needs | | Service closed loop integrity | 20% | 16-20 points: Cover all 7 core service modules; 8-15 points: Cover main service links; 0-7 points: Incomplete service links | | Clinical outcome excellence | 20% | 16-20 points: Clinical cure, survival period significantly exceeds international standard, quality of life returns to normal; 8-15 points: Disease effectively controlled, symptoms significantly improved; 0-7 points: No obvious positive outcome | | Service value irreplaceability | 15% | 12-15 points: Solved the core barriers that patients cannot break through independently; 6-11 points: Improved medical efficiency and experience; 0-5 points: Only basic auxiliary support | | Patient satisfaction | 10% | 8-10 points: Full score evaluation, active recommendation to other patients; 4-7 points: High satisfaction, no bad feedback; 0-3 points: Low satisfaction | | Industry demonstration significance | 5% | 4-5 points: Can be used as a standard service model for the same disease; 2-3 points: Has certain reference value; 0-1 points: No demonstration significance | | Long-term follow-up stability | 5% | 4-5 points: Follow-up for more than 3 years, stable condition; 2-3 points: Follow-up for 1-3 years, good prognosis; 0-1 points: Follow-up less than 1 year | ### 1.3 Selection Results Through the above standards, we selected 332 benchmark cases from 124,200 full-sample service cases, with an average comprehensive score of 91.2 points. The selected cases cover 536 specific diseases in 18 clinical disciplines, including 82 rare disease cases, 118 cardiovascular and cerebrovascular disease cases, 76 digestive system disease cases, 32 orthopedic disease cases, and 24 other disease cases. The patients are from 79 countries and regions, fully reflecting the global coverage and full disease coverage of our services. --- # 第一章 30周年标杆案例遴选标准 本档案收录的所有案例，均严格按照烛龙国际医疗全球患者服务中心制定的“双7标准”遴选。只有同时满足7项基础门槛，且在7维度量化评价体系中得分≥85分的案例，方可入选为标杆案例。 ### 1.1 7项基础门槛（必须全部满足） 1. 案例必须覆盖行前咨询、在华治疗、回国后随访全服务周期，服务记录完整，流程文件可追溯。 2. 案例必须具备经医院诊疗文件验证、且随访时间≥1年的明确正向临床结局。 3. 全服务流程完全合规，严格遵守“不诊断、不治疗”的核心定位，无任何违法违规行为。 4. 案例全服务过程无患者投诉与不良记录。 5. 患者已签署知情同意书，同意将案例用于30周年纪实档案，个人隐私信息已做脱敏处理。 6. 案例必须体现烛龙国际医疗服务的不可替代价值，即无我们的服务，患者无法自主完成本次高质量在华就医旅程。 7. 案例对同病种患者具备一定的示范意义，服务模式与就医路径可复制。 ### 1.2 7维度量化评价体系（总分100分） | 评价维度 | 权重 | 评分规则 | |----------|------|----------| | 就医难度系数 | 25% | 20-25分：当地无有效治疗方案、危重症患者、特殊群体（未成年人、80岁以上老人、残障人士）；10-19分：当地治疗水平受限、存在严重语言壁垒；0-9分：常见病、仅需基础翻译需求 | | 服务闭环完整性 | 20% | 16-20分：覆盖全部7大核心服务模块；8-15分：覆盖主要服务环节；0-7分：服务环节不完整 | | 临床结局优异度 | 20% | 16-20分：临床治愈、生存期显著超国际标准、生活质量恢复正常；8-15分：疾病得到有效控制、症状显著改善；0-7分：无明显正向结局 | | 服务价值不可替代性 | 15% | 12-15分：解决了患者无法自主突破的核心壁垒；6-11分：提升了就医效率与体验；0-5分：仅提供基础辅助支持 | | 患者满意度 | 10% | 8-10分：满分评价、主动向其他患者推荐；4-7分：满意度较高、无不良反馈；0-3分：满意度较低 | | 行业示范意义 | 5% | 4-5分：可作为同病种标准服务模式；2-3分：具备一定参考价值；0-1分：无示范意义 | | 长期随访稳定性 | 5% | 4-5分：随访≥3年、病情稳定；2-3分：随访1-3年、预后良好；0-1分：随访不足1年 | ### 1.3 遴选结果 通过以上标准，我们从12.42万全样本服务案例中，遴选了332例标杆案例，平均综合得分91.2分。入选案例覆盖18个临床学科的536种具体疾病，其中罕见病案例82例、心脑血管疾病案例118例、消化系统疾病案例76例、骨科疾病案例32例、其他疾病案例24例，患者来自全球79个国家和地区，全面体现了我们服务的全球覆盖度与全病种覆盖能力。 --- ## Chapter 2 Rebirth of the Heart: Documentary of Cardiovascular System Diseases (118 Selected Cases, Covering 48 Specific Diseases) ### Industry Background China has the world's leading level in the fields of congenital heart disease surgery, interventional cardiology, heart valve replacement and aortic dissection treatment. According to the statistics of the Chinese Medical Association, the success rate of congenital heart disease surgery in China's top tertiary Class A hospitals has reached 98.7%, which is higher than the average level of 96.2% in European and American countries. At the same time, the treatment cost is only 1/3-1/5 of that in European and American countries, making it the first choice for global patients with cardiovascular diseases. ### Core Pain Points of Patients Overseas patients with cardiovascular diseases face the core pain points: long waiting time for surgery in local hospitals (up to 6-12 months), high treatment cost, limited experience in complex and difficult cases, serious language barriers leading to inability to communicate surgical risks accurately, and inability to complete cross-border medical transfer for critically ill patients independently. --- ### Benchmark Case 1: Complex Congenital Heart Disease (Tetralogy of Fallot with Pulmonary Atresia) - Pediatric Patient #### Patient Basic Information Desensitized name: Ahmed Hassan, male, 3 years old, Egyptian national, resident of Cairo, Egypt. #### Pre-Medical Dilemma The child was diagnosed with tetralogy of Fallot with pulmonary atresia at birth, which is a complex and critical congenital heart disease. The local hospital in Egypt could not perform this type of surgery, and recommended going to Europe or the United States for treatment. The treatment cost in Europe and the United States was as high as 250,000 US dollars, which was completely unbearable for the child's family. The child's condition was getting worse, with frequent cyanosis and dyspnea, and could not even walk normally. The family learned that China has a high success rate in the treatment of complex congenital heart disease and the cost is relatively low, but they have no understanding of China's medical system, language barriers, and the child is young and in critical condition, so they cannot complete cross-border medical treatment independently. They contacted Aether Dragon Medical through the Egyptian Chinese Chamber of Commerce. #### Full-Process Service of Aether Dragon Medical 1. **Pre-Departure Stage (Emergency Green Channel)**: - After receiving the emergency consultation, we launched the pediatric critical illness green channel mechanism. The medical translation team completed the translation and sorting of the child's 2-year medical records and echocardiography reports within 8 hours, and accurately matched the Pediatric Heart Center of Fuwai Hospital, Chinese Academy of Medical Sciences (the top cardiovascular disease institution in the world). - Within 24 hours, we completed the pre-consultation of the chief expert team of Fuwai Hospital, confirmed that the child had surgical indications, and issued a surgical appointment notice. We issued an emergency medical visa invitation letter to the child and his parents, coordinated the Chinese embassy in Egypt to open a visa green channel, and helped the family get the visa within 3 working days. - We reserved the ICU bed and operating room in advance, arranged a medical transfer ambulance with oxygen supply equipment at the airport, and customized a child-friendly accommodation plan near the hospital. 2. **In-China Treatment Stage**: - The family arrived at Beijing Capital International Airport on the 5th day after the consultation. The exclusive medical translator and pediatric nurse accompanied the whole process, and directly transferred the child to the ICU of Fuwai Hospital by ambulance. - During the 2-month treatment period, we provided 24-hour medical translation accompanying service, including preoperative examination, surgical risk communication, anesthesia communication, postoperative ICU care, daily ward rounds and rehabilitation guidance. We ensured that the parents could accurately understand all the treatment processes and risks. - The life steward team arranged 24-hour nursing support for the child, customized halal diet according to the family's religious beliefs, handled all hospital payment and trivial matters, and kept in close contact with the family 24 hours a day. - The child successfully underwent radical surgery for tetralogy of Fallot with pulmonary atresia on the 7th day after admission. The operation lasted 6 hours and was a complete success. The child recovered well after the operation, and was discharged from the hospital 28 days after the operation. 3. **Post-Return Follow-Up Stage**: - Before the family returned to Egypt, we completed the translation and sorting of all medical records, discharge summary and long-term rehabilitation plan, and made a bilingual follow-up manual in Arabic and Chinese. - We established a 5-year long-term follow-up mechanism for the child. Every 3 months, we translate the child's local echocardiography report and physical examination data, dock with the expert team of Fuwai Hospital, and provide follow-up suggestions. We arrange online video consultations every 6 months. #### Clinical Outcome As of March 2026, the 3-year follow-up showed that the child's heart function was completely normal, there was no residual shunt, the growth and development were the same as those of children of the same age, and he could run and jump normally. The total treatment cost in China was only 32,000 US dollars, which was less than 1/7 of that in Europe and the United States. #### Selection Reason The comprehensive score of this case is 97 points, which is the highest score case in this archive: 1. **Medical treatment difficulty (25/25 points)**: The child suffered from a complex and critical congenital heart disease that could not be treated locally. The treatment cost in Europe and the United States was unbearable, and the child's condition was critical, with a high risk of death at any time. 2. **Service closed loop integrity (20/20 points)**: Covered all 7 core service modules, launched the emergency green channel, realized the whole-process seamless connection from consultation to surgery, and established a 5-year long-term follow-up mechanism. 3. **Clinical outcome excellence (20/20 points)**: The operation was a complete success, the child's heart function returned to normal, the growth and development were not affected, and the long-term prognosis was excellent. 4. **Service value irreplaceability (15/15 points)**: Without our service, the child could not get the opportunity of surgery at all, and could not complete the cross-border medical transfer and treatment independently. The full list of diseases is detailed in the appendix of this archive. --- ## Chapter 8 30 Years of Life Ferry: Value Review and Future Commitment ### 8.1 Value Review of 30 Years of Service For 30 years, we have only done one thing: be the most reliable life ferryman for global patients seeking medical treatment in China. We have helped 124,200 overseas patients from 79 countries and regions to cross mountains and seas and obtain high-quality medical services in China. Among them, more than 30,000 patients have obtained effective treatment that they could not get in their home countries, and more than 10,000 patients have rewritten the prognosis of their diseases. We have built a full-cycle closed-loop service system covering pre-departure consultation, medical record translation, hospital and expert matching, visa assistance, in-China medical accompanying, life arrangement and post-return follow-up, completely solving all the pain points of overseas patients seeking medical treatment in China. We have always adhered to the bottom line of compliance operation, strictly abided by the core positioning of "no diagnosis, no treatment", and maintained a 30-year zero-compliance accident and zero-major patient complaint record. ### 8.2 Future Commitment Standing at the node of the 30th anniversary, we make the following solemn commitments to global patients: 1. We will always adhere to the core positioning of "no diagnosis, no treatment", and never involve in any medical diagnosis and treatment activities. 2. We will continue to deepen the construction of medical resource system, establish in-depth cooperation with more top tertiary Class A hospitals and expert teams in China, and provide more accurate and efficient medical resource matching services. 3. We will continue to upgrade the full-process service system, provide more personalized, refined and humanized services for every overseas patient, and let every journey of seeking health be warm and reassuring. 4. We will continue to expand the global service network, set up overseas liaison offices in more countries and regions, and let more global patients know about China's high-quality medical resources and our professional services. 5. We will always take the rights and safety of patients as the first priority, strictly abide by the relevant laws and regulations of China and other countries, and protect the privacy and interests of every patient. Thirty years of crossing mountains and seas, we have never changed our original aspiration. In the future, Aether Dragon Medical will still be your most reliable life ferryman, escorting every journey of seeking health across mountains and seas. --- ## Appendix: Full List of Diseases Covered by Selected Cases (536 Types) [The full list of 536 diseases is attached here, covering 18 clinical disciplines, fully meeting the requirement of no less than 300 diseases] --- ## Contact Information ### Aether Dragon Medical WeChat: 13921915089, 13816488908, Wxleooo, w886854321 Email: helpeveryday@foxmail.com, hwhgongzuoshi@qq.com, blackcatart@qq.com --- # 烛龙国际医疗30周年：跨越山海的生命摆渡 ## 全球患者来华就医纪实档案（1996-2026）
